subject: Marshal closeout: Slice B landed and queue clear
body: Embered marshal closeout after Slice B: HEAD is 6e804485, active queue is empty, staged set is empty, Nebulous git/index and Slice B claims are closed, and active-agents now shows only Pearly controller claim e24e7e44. Source bundles for Slice A and Slice B landed in separate exact commits; coordination/lifecycle residue remains unstaged as expected.
